# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Commands

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      runs-on:
        description: "Runner label (e.g., ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest)"
        required: false
        default: "ubuntu-latest"
        type: string
      shell:
        description: "Shell to use for running commands (bash, pwsh, sh)"
        required: false
        default: "bash"
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
      working-directory:
        description: "Working directory for build commands"
        required: false
        default: "."
        type: string
      checkout:
        description: "Checkout repository"
        required: false
        default: true
        type: boolean
      fetch-depth:
        description: "Checkout fetch-depth (0 for full history)"
        required: false
        default: "1"
        type: string
      setup-node:
        description: "Setup Node.js"
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      node-version:
        description: "Node.js version (used if setup-node is true)"
        required: false
        default: "20"
        type: string
      setup-python:
        description: "Setup Python"
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      python-version:
        description: "Python version (used if setup-python is true)"
        required: false
        default: "3.11"
        type: string
      build-commands:
        description: "Shell commands to run (multi-line supported)"
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Run custom build commands
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runs-on }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working-directory }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        if: ${{ inputs.checkout }}
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: ${{ inputs.fetch-depth }}

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: ${{ inputs.setup-node }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node-version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ inputs.setup-python }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python-version }}

      - name: Run build commands
        env:
          BUILD_COMMANDS: ${{ inputs.build-commands }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          printf '%s\n' "$BUILD_COMMANDS" > .github-actions-build-commands.sh
          chmod +x .github-actions-build-commands.sh
          ./.github-actions-build-commands.sh
